summary: The session focused on the features and benefits of the unisex heavy cotton tee, highlighting its suitability as a wardrobe staple for casual fashion. Key points included its smooth surface for printing, comfort due to the lack of side seams, and improved durability from taped shoulders.
facts: The unisex heavy cotton tee is made of 100% cotton, with fiber content varying for different colors. The medium fabric weighs 5.3 oz/yd² (180 g/m²). The tee features a classic fit and a tear-away label. It runs true to size and is designed without side seams to prevent itchy interruptions under the arms. The shoulders of the tee have tape for improved durability. The unisex heavy cotton tee is suitable for personalized designs to enhance profitability.
